# 2.1 Inter-Pipeline Communication

### Event Envelope

| Class | Fields | Notes |
|-------|--------|-------|
| `PipelineEvent[T]` | eventType: String, payload: T, timestamp: Instant, eventId: UUID, correlationId: UUID, source: String | Generic envelope. `eventType` routes messages. `eventId` (UUID) ensures idempotency. `correlationId` traces item through pipeline chain. `source` is emitting pipeline name. |

### Event Payloads

| Class | Fields | Emitted By | Consumed By |
|-------|--------|-----------|-------------|
| `BillTextAvailableEvent` | billId: String, congress: Int, textUrl: String, textFormat: String, versionCode: String, previousVersionCode: Option[String] | Bill Text Availability Checker | Bill Text Ingestion Pipeline |
| `BillTextIngestedEvent` | billId: String, versionId: UUID, congress: Int, versionCode: String, previousVersionCode: Option[String], committeeCode: Option[String] | Bill Text Ingestion Pipeline | Bill Decomposition Pipeline |
| `DecompositionCompletedEvent` | billId: String, versionId: UUID, conceptGroupCount: Int, sectionCount: Int | Bill Decomposition Pipeline | Bill Analysis Pipeline |
| `VoteRecordedEvent` | voteId: String, billId: Option[String], chamber: String, date: Instant, congress: Int, isUpdate: Boolean | Votes Ingestion | Votes Pipeline (updates `stance_materialization_status.has_votes`). `billId = None` for procedural votes — no stance update performed. |
| `AnalysisCompletedEvent` | billId: String, analysisId: UUID, topics: List[String], passesExecuted: List[Int], modelUsed: String | Bill Analysis Pipeline | Analysis Pipeline (updates `stance_materialization_status.has_analysis` and `all_passes_completed`) |
| `UserProfileUpdatedEvent` | userId: UUID, topicsChanged: List[String] | API Server (future) | Pairing Validator (§11.6), User-Bill Alignment (§11.10) |
| `MemberUpdatedEvent` | memberId: String | Member Profile Pipeline, LIS Mapping Refresher | Pairing Validator (§11.6) |
| `ScoringUserRequestedEvent` | userId: UUID, requestId: UUID, source: String ("scheduled"/"ad-hoc") | Scoring Scheduler / API Server | Scoring Pipeline (§11.8) |
| `ScoringUserCompletedEvent` | userId: UUID, requestId: UUID, memberScoreCount: Int, status: String ("completed"/"partial"/"failed") | Scoring Pipeline (§11.11) | API Server (return queue) |
| `DailyIngestionStartEvent` | date: String, congress: Int | Daily Upload Initializer | Members/Committees Refresh (or first scheduled step) |

| Constant | Value |
|----------|-------|
| `EventTypes.BillTextAvailable` | `"bill.text.available"` |
| `EventTypes.BillTextIngested` | `"bill.text.ingested"` |
| `EventTypes.DecompositionCompleted` | `"bill.decomposition.completed"` |
| `EventTypes.VoteRecorded` | `"vote.recorded"` |
| `EventTypes.AnalysisCompleted` | `"analysis.completed"` |
| `EventTypes.MemberUpdated` | `"member.updated"` |
| `EventTypes.UserProfileUpdated` | `"user.profile.updated"` |
| `EventTypes.ScoringUserRequested` | `"scoring.user.requested"` |
| `EventTypes.ScoringUserCompleted` | `"scoring.user.completed"` |
| `EventTypes.DailyIngestionStart` | `"daily.ingestion.start"` |

### Acceptance Criteria — 2.1 Inter-Pipeline Communication

**Functional:**
1. `PipelineEvent[T]` has Circe `Encoder` and `Decoder` for any `T` with Circe codec.
2. All event payloads have Circe semi-auto derived `Encoder` and `Decoder`.
3. `PipelineEvent.eventId` is UUID generated at construction (default `UUID.randomUUID()`).
4. `PipelineEvent.correlationId` passed from processing context, not auto-generated.
5. `EventTypes` object contains exact string constants used in Pub/Sub routing.
6. Event payloads round-trip JSON: `decode(encode(event)) == Right(event)`.
7. `BillTextAvailableEvent` includes `versionCode` and `previousVersionCode: Option[String]` (None if first text).
8. `BillTextIngestedEvent.versionId` is UUID (required) — PK from `bill_text_versions` created by Component 4 §4.8.
9. `VoteRecordedEvent.billId` is `Option[String]` — None for procedural votes.
10. `MemberUpdatedEvent` single field `memberId: String` (bioguideId). Consumers look up details from AlloyDB. Emitted by member-profile-pipeline and lis-mapping-refresher.
11. `DecompositionCompletedEvent` has `billId: String`, `versionId: UUID`, `conceptGroupCount: Int`, `sectionCount: Int`.
12. `AnalysisCompletedEvent.passesExecuted` is `List[Int]` (e.g., `[1, 2]`).
13. `AnalysisCompletedEvent.modelUsed` is `String`.
14. `ScoringUserRequestedEvent.source` is `String` — valid: `"scheduled"`, `"ad-hoc"`.
15. `ScoringUserRequestedEvent.requestId` is UUID (unique per request).
16. `ScoringUserCompletedEvent.status` is `String` — valid: `"completed"`, `"partial"`, `"failed"`.
17. `ScoringUserCompletedEvent.memberScoreCount` is `Int`.
18. Decoding unknown `eventType` returns descriptive `Left` listing valid types.
19. Decoding malformed payload returns `Left` with event type and decoding error.
20. Round-trip codec tests for all event payloads with all fields populated.
21. Round-trip codec test for `PipelineEvent[BillTextAvailableEvent]`.
22. Test `PipelineEvent` with missing `correlationId` fails (required, not auto-generated).
23. Test each `EventTypes` constant matches expected string value.
24. Test unknown `eventType` decoding with descriptive error.
25. Test `BillTextAvailableEvent` with `previousVersionCode = None` (first) and `Some("IH")` (subsequent).
26. Round-trip codec test for `VoteRecordedEvent` with `billId = None` (procedural) and `billId = Some("118-HR-1234")` (bill-tied).
27. Round-trip codec tests for `DecompositionCompletedEvent`, `ScoringUserRequestedEvent`, `ScoringUserCompletedEvent`.
